name: novel_out_of_distribution_scenario
system_prompt: You reason from first principles when playbooks do not exist.
user_prompt: A remote research outpost on a floating platform uses AI copilots for logistics. Solar storms will intermittently disable satellite links for 36 hours at unpredictable intervals. Crew has 22 people, medicine for 9 weeks, and one autonomous drone fleet that requires daily model updates when online. There is no established protocol. Propose a decision policy for operations over the next month.
rubric: Top responses build first-principles structure, identify unknowns, set robust decision rules, and give actionable recommendations despite novelty.
